title: Underfortress Entry Hall
text: A vast under-hall opens beneath the fort. Rune-carved pillars rise like ribs from the floor; cold torchlight catches in dust and sigils.
imagePrompt: A cavernous subterranean hall with rune-carved pillars, cold torchlight, drifting dust and a hush of long-remembered rites.

choices.text: Force open an inner vault door

title: Reliquary Chamber
text: The chamber hums with low power. On a central plinth an iron-latticed reliquary holds a pale, humming artifact — its glow a living thing.
imagePrompt: A circular reliquary chamber with a central plinth holding a glowing artifact encased in iron, sigils etched into the stone.

choices.text: Leave the relic and search the perimeter

title: Archon Vault
text: A sealed vault stands sentry beneath gears and warding runes. Something moves in the dark — a warding construct waking to its old purpose.
imagePrompt: A sealed stone vault guarded by a mechanical warding archon: gears, arcane filaments and a brooding, metallic silhouette.

title: Reliquary Throne
text: At the underfortress' heart a throne holds a husk bound in wards. The relics that circle it hum with memory and coercive intent.
imagePrompt: An ancient throne in dim light, surrounded by reliquary artifacts and binding runes that pulse faintly with power.

choices.text: Destroy the bindings and free the spirit
